caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, a black hoodie with "BOSS" written in gold letters, and a gold watch sits at a dark table in a studio setting. He wears over-ear headphones and speaks into a professional microphone mounted on a boom arm. Behind him is a white backdrop featuring a logo with five gold stars and the text "UNICORN HUSTLE," while a sign above him reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". On the table, there is a black box and a black container with red text that says "TALK OUT". As the sequence progresses, the man's facial expressions change as he speaks, and he begins to gesture with his hands, moving them forward and outward to emphasize his points. He remains seated in the same position throughout the clip, focusing his attention on someone off-screen.
